visual: Empty stance with weight on the rear leg, forward hand extends palm-up at chest height while the rear hand withdraws to the hip, as if patting a horse's neck.
motion_description: Starting from a stance with the left arm extended forward and the right hand hooked backward, the performer shifts their weight fully onto the rear right leg. Opening the torso to the right, both arms extend to the sides with palms turned upward before the right arm bends, drawing the palm toward the chest. Maintaining a slow, continuous flow, the torso rotates back to the front as the left foot pulls inward to lightly touch the floor in an empty stance; simultaneously, the right hand strikes forward at shoulder height while the left hand withdraws toward the hip.
